Vendor.title: Vendor
Vendor.description: Represents a street food vendor or stall that offers items through the Craving platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Vendor entity.

ownerId.description: The Firebase UID of the vendor's manager.

name.description: The name of the food stall or vendor business.

gstNumber.description: The GST registration number of the vendor.

fssaiNumber.description: The FSSAI license number of the vendor.

description.description: A brief description of the vendor's cuisine or specialties.

locationDescription.description: A textual description of the vendor's physical location, e.g., 'Stall #24, Main Market'.

contactEmail.description: The primary email address for vendor contact.

contactPhone.description: The primary phone number for vendor contact.

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the vendor's profile or stall image.

qrCodeUrl.description: URL to the unique QR code image generated for this vendor's menu, enabling customer ordering.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the vendor record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the vendor record was last updated.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the vendor is currently active and visible on the platform.

MenuItem.title: MenuItem
MenuItem.description: Represents a single food item or dish offered by a vendor on their digital menu.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MenuItem entity.

vendorId.description: Reference to the Vendor who offers this menu item. (Relationship: Vendor 1:N MenuItem)

name.description: The name of the food item, e.g., 'Aloo Tikki Chaat'.

description.description: A detailed description of the menu item, potentially generated by AI.

price.description: The current selling price of the menu item.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image of the food item.

isAvailable.description: Indicates whether the menu item is currently available for order.

category.description: The category of the menu item, e.g., 'Snacks', 'Main Course', 'Beverages'.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the menu item record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the menu item record was last updated.

Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: Represents a customer who places orders through the Craving platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Customer entity.

phoneNumber.description: The primary phone number of the customer, used for identification and loyalty programs.

name.description: The full name of the customer (optional).

email.description: The email address of the customer (optional).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the customer record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the customer record was last updated.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer's order placed at a specific vendor.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer who placed this order. (Relationship: Customer 1:N Order)

vendorId.description: Reference to the Vendor from whom this order was placed. (Relationship: Vendor 1:N Order)

orderItemIds.description: References to the individual OrderItem entities that comprise this order. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the order, including all items and taxes/fees.

status.description: The current status of the order, e.g., 'Pending', 'Accepted', 'Preparing', 'Ready', 'Completed', 'Cancelled'.

paymentStatus.description: The status of the payment for this order, e.g., 'Pending', 'Paid', 'Failed', 'Refunded'.

paymentMethod.description: The method used for payment, e.g., 'UPI', 'Card', 'Wallet'.

orderTime.description: Timestamp when the order was placed by the customer.

pickupTime.description: Expected or actual timestamp when the order is/was picked up.

notes.description: General notes or special instructions for the entire order.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents a specific item within an order, capturing details at the time of purchase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order this item belongs to. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

menuItemId.description: Reference to the MenuItem that was ordered. (Relationship: MenuItem 1:N OrderItem)

quantity.description: The quantity of this menu item ordered.

unitPriceAtOrder.description: The price of a single unit of the item at the time the order was placed.

customizations.description: Specific customization notes for this particular item, e.g., 'extra spicy', 'no onions'.

notes.description: Additional notes relevant to this specific order item.

LoyaltyProgram.title: LoyaltyProgram
LoyaltyProgram.description: Defines the rules and structure of a loyalty program offered by a vendor.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LoyaltyProgram entity.

vendorId.description: Reference to the Vendor offering this loyalty program. (Relationship: Vendor 1:N LoyaltyProgram)

name.description: The name of the loyalty program, e.g., 'Buy 4 Get 1 Free'.

description.description: A detailed description of the loyalty program's mechanics and rewards.

type.description: The type of loyalty program, e.g., 'BuyNGetMFree', 'PointsBased'.

buyCount.description: For 'BuyNGetMFree' programs, the number of items or orders a customer needs to buy to earn a reward.

getFreeCount.description: For 'BuyNGetMFree' programs, the number of free items or rewards the customer receives.

appliesToMenuItemIds.description: Optional: References to specific MenuItems to which this loyalty program applies. If empty, it applies generally. (Relationship: MenuItem N:N LoyaltyProgram)

isActive.description: Indicates whether the loyalty program is currently active.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the loyalty program was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the loyalty program was last updated.

CustomerLoyalty.title: CustomerLoyalty
CustomerLoyalty.description: Tracks a specific customer's progress and rewards within a loyalty program offered by a vendor.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CustomerLoyalty entity.

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer whose loyalty is being tracked. (Relationship: Customer 1:N CustomerLoyalty)

loyaltyProgramId.description: Reference to the LoyaltyProgram this record is tracking against. (Relationship: LoyaltyProgram 1:N CustomerLoyalty)

currentProgress.description: The current count of purchases or actions made by the customer towards earning the next reward.

rewardsAvailable.description: The number of earned rewards that are currently available for the customer to redeem.

totalRewardsEarned.description: The total number of rewards the customer has earned through this program over time.

totalRewardsRedeemed.description: The total number of rewards the customer has redeemed through this program over time.

lastActivityDate.description: Timestamp of the last activity (purchase or redemption) for this customer in this loyalty program.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this customer loyalty record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this customer loyalty record was last updated.

definition.description: Top-level collection for vendor profiles. Each document's `id` matches its document ID. Includes denormalized `ownerId` (the Firebase UID of the vendor's manager) for authorization independence.

params.name: vendorId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Vendor, matching the document ID.

definition.description: Subcollection of menu items for a specific vendor. Each document's `id` matches its document ID. Includes denormalized `vendorId` (from parent `Vendor`) and `vendorOwnerId` (the Firebase UID of the vendor's manager) for authorization independence.

params.name: vendorId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Vendor.

params.name: menuItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the MenuItem, matching the document ID.

definition.description: Subcollection for loyalty programs offered by a specific vendor. Each document's `id` matches its document ID. Includes denormalized `vendorId` (from parent `Vendor`) and `vendorOwnerId` (the Firebase UID of the vendor's manager) for authorization independence.

params.name: vendorId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Vendor.

params.name: loyaltyProgramId
params.description: The unique identifier for the LoyaltyProgram, matching the document ID.

definition.description: Top-level collection for customer profiles. Each document's `id` matches its document ID, which also corresponds to the Firebase UID of the customer (`ownerId`) for authorization independence.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Customer, matching the Firebase UID of the user and the document ID.

definition.description: Top-level collection for all customer orders. Each document's `id` matches its document ID. Contains `customerId` and `vendorId` fields for authorization independence, allowing both the customer and the vendor to access their respective orders.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Order, matching the document ID.

definition.description: Subcollection for individual items within a specific order. Each document's `id` matches its document ID. Includes denormalized `orderId` (from parent `Order`), `customerId`, and `vendorId` (both from parent `Order`) for authorization independence.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Order.

params.name: orderItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the OrderItem, matching the document ID.

definition.description: Subcollection tracking a customer's progress in loyalty programs. Each document's `id` matches its document ID. Includes denormalized `customerId` (from parent `Customer`), `customerOwnerId` (the Firebase UID of the customer), and `vendorId` (from the associated `LoyaltyProgram`) for authorization independence.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Customer.

params.name: customerLoyaltyId
params.description: The unique identifier for the CustomerLoyalty record, matching the document ID.
